context.role: Optional decorative cloud element to add depth and atmosphere, larger variant for visual variety
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), random y between 10-40px, scrolls left at Current_Speed * 0.5 (parallax effect)
context.usage_scenario: Optional visual enhancement, spawns randomly every 5-10 seconds with 30% probability (chosen randomly with cloud_small), maximum 3 clouds total on screen, scrolls at half speed for depth perception

visual_specification.shape: Simple pixel art cloud with rounded bumpy top, larger than cloud_small
visual_specification.outline: None (cloud shape defined by filled pixels)

animation.description: Horizontal scrolling at -Current_Speed * 0.5 px/s (parallax effect), despawns when X < -100px

visual_specification.details: Minimalist cloud shape with 3-4 rounded bumps on top, simple silhouette in Primary color, approximately double the size of cloud_small

relationships.shared_with: Same color and parallax speed (50%) as cloud_small
relationships.differences_from: cloud_small is 46x14px (half size), pterodactyl_fly scrolls at 100% speed and has collision, clouds have no collision and scroll at 50% speed

explicit_negations: No dense placement (maximum 3 clouds total on screen)
No bright or contrasting colors (Primary #535353 only)
No detailed internal texture (simple silhouette only)
